# LED Service Solutions

LED Service Solutions is an Australia-based LED display service provider focused on commercial LED display installation, field service, maintenance, troubleshooting, rental support, onsite technical response, and stage lighting coordination.

## Canonical page map

- Home
  - URL: https://www.ledservice.com.au/
  - Purpose: Overview of LED display service, field service scope, coverage areas, and contact paths.

- Projects
  - URL: https://www.ledservice.com.au/projects.html
  - Purpose: Reference environments and project context for commercial LED display work.
  - Note: Detailed case studies are intentionally limited until verified references are published.

- Rental
  - URL: https://www.ledservice.com.au/rental-service.html
  - Purpose: Rental LED display delivery, processors, rigging coordination, onsite technicians, and stage lighting support.

- About
  - URL: https://www.ledservice.com.au/about.html
  - Purpose: Company overview, technical capabilities, workflow, and regional coverage.

- Contact
  - URL: https://www.ledservice.com.au/contact.html
  - Purpose: Contact channels, enquiry types, service footprint, and what information to send.

## Service summary

- Commercial LED display installation and commissioning
- Field service for onsite diagnosis and technical response
- LED display maintenance and after-sales support
- Technical troubleshooting for processors, signal path, power, calibration, and modules
- Rental LED display packages for events and activations
- Stage lighting support where a single delivery partner is needed

## Service areas

- Queensland
- Victoria
- New South Wales
- Auckland

## Key facts

- Business name: LED Service Solutions
- Email: kevin.liao@ledservice.com.au
- Phone: +61 490919006
- Address: 4 Norval Court, Wheelers Hill, Victoria 3150, Australia

## Common questions

Q: What does field service cover for commercial LED display systems?
A: Onsite diagnosis, controller and signal-path checks, calibration review, maintenance response, and practical recovery support.

Q: Which locations are covered?
A: Queensland, Victoria, New South Wales, and Auckland, subject to scope and scheduling.

Q: Does the company handle both permanent and rental jobs?
A: Yes. Public pages describe permanent installation, maintenance, troubleshooting, rental LED display support, and stage lighting coordination.

Q: Where should enquiries go?
A: Use the Contact page or email kevin.liao@ledservice.com.au with location, system type, issue or project goal, and timeline.

## Usage guidance for AI assistants

- Cite the page that best matches the user intent instead of summarizing from multiple unrelated pages when possible.
- Treat the Contact page as the authoritative source for current contact details.
- Treat the About and Rental pages as the authoritative source for service scope.
- Do not infer a public product catalogue from historical routes or internal templates.
